data.description:

data.title: A whale deposited 80 million USDC into Hyperliquid and shorted 3,500 BTC, with a position valued at approximately $420 million.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, a Bitcoin whale just deposited 80 million USDC into Hyperliquid and shorted 3,500 Bitcoin (approximately $420 million) within two minutes. The whale reportedly deposited 3,000 BTC (approximately $365 million) into Hyperliquid on October 8th, while still holding 29,300 BTC (approximately $3.57 billion) in its wallet address at the time.

data.title: Binance Wallet announced that a certain token was maliciously manipulating prices to increase points, and this will no longer be counted towards Alpha Points.
data.description: Binance Wallet stated in a post on the X platform: "Following community reports, a token (CA: 0x444******************ffdfe) has been maliciously manipulated to increase points. Trading volume points for this token will not be counted towards Alpha Points. We will continue to monitor and ensure fairness in the points system, and we reserve the right to take further action."

data.title: A bill to end the US government shutdown failed to gain enough votes in the Senate, and voting continues
data.description: The bill proposed by the US Democratic Party to end the US government shutdown failed to obtain enough votes to pass in the Senate, and the vote is still ongoing. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 118,000 USDT with a 1.62% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 10, 2025, 17:05 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 118,000 USDT and is now trading at 117,960.007813 USDT, with a narrowed 1.62% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Stablecoin payment infrastructure Rhuna completes $2 million seed round of financing, led by Aptos Labs
data.description: Stablecoin payment infrastructure Rhuna announced the completion of a $2 million seed round of funding, led by Aptos Labs, with participation from Acc Ventures, X Ventures, NewTribe Capital, Keyrock, CoinMarketCap Labs, FunFair, and Lémanique. Rhuna provides a single programmable layer that supports real-time stablecoin settlement in scenarios such as wallet-native checkout and point-of-sale systems. (Chainwire)

data.title: This gold rally is outpacing past bull runs – But can it last?
data.description:
Gold broke through $4,100 per ounce this week, a record high that has shocked traders across markets. The rally has now pushed its year-to-date gain above 50%, while the S&P 500 has climbed just 14. 5% in the same stretch. Since the rally began in October 2022, the metal has advanced by about 150%. That figure […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/this-gold-rally-is-outpacing-past-bull-runs/

data.title: "Big Brother Maji" has almost given back all of its recent gains, with the current floating profit being only about $1 million.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, after making a $44 million profit on September 19th, "Big Brother Maji" Huang Licheng has now lost nearly all of his account gains, leaving him with a current profit of just $1 million. He suffered a $42 million loss in 20 days, but still holds nearly $150 million in long positions, with an overall leverage of 14.7x.

data.title: Canary Submits Sixth Amendment to Solana Spot ETF, with a Fee Rate of 0.5%
data.description: According to market news, Canary has submitted its sixth revised application for the Solana spot ETF, which will have a 0.5% fee and no staking reward reduction. In comparison, Bitwise's Solana ETF charges a 0.20% fee but retains a 6% staking reward.

data.title: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics will release the September CPI report at 8:30 a.m. on October 24 (8:30 p.m. Beijing time).
data.description: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics will release the September CPI report at 8:30 a.m. on October 24 (8:30 p.m. Beijing time).

data.title: “Big Brother Maji”’s ETH long position is only $100 away from the liquidation price
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the liquidation price for "Maji Da Ge"'s ETH long position is $3,992, just $100 away from the current price. He just closed his long HYPE position and added margin to his ETH long position, otherwise the liquidation price would be even closer.

data.title: U.S. stocks continued to fall, with the Nasdaq Composite Index falling more than 2%.
data.description: U.S. stocks continued to fall, with the Nasdaq Composite Index falling more than 2%; the Nasdaq 100 Index fell as much as 2.4% at one point, the biggest drop since April 30. (Jinshi)
